hero.title: Cameroon's circular cocoa agropole
hero.subtitle: Zero-deforestation premium cocoa, OAPI-patented animal feed, EUDR/CacaoTrace traceability. A multi-revenue model serving 1,200 producers.

poles.subtitle: Our model
poles.title: Two poles, one circularity
poles.description: We valorize 100% of cocoa by-products — beans, husks, biomass — in a circular economy logic.

pole1.title: 🏭 Pole 1 — Premium Cocoa
pole1.description: Collection, fermentation and drying of premium beans from 1,200 producers across 6 villages of the Bouba basin.

pole2.title: 🐔 Pole 2 — Feed Mill & Farm
pole2.description: Valorization of cocoa husks into livestock feed « CRI-PROVEND CACAO » — formulation protected by OAPI patent.
features: -15% vs market · -20-30% for the end farmer

rse.title: Zero deforestation, zero waste, zero CO₂
rse.description: Our CSR commitment is backed by the CIMAR-Technopôle program: agroecology promotion, youth and women training-integration, bio-inputs diffusion.

card2.title: 100% circular
card2.text: Husks, biomass, biofertilizers: everything is valorized

investors.title: Invest in sustainable African cocoa
investors.description: 3.2 Bn FCFA financing sought over 2026-2030 for a mature, differentiated and bankable project. Access our secure data room.

cookies.title: Cookies & privacy
cookies.description: We use strictly necessary cookies (session) and an anonymized analytics tool (Plausible, no cookie). No advertising trackers.
